title: Cozy Vegetable Bhuna
description: This savory, flaky dish features a blend of roasted vegetables and spices in a rich vegetable oil sauce, perfect for cozy nights.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic; sauté until translucent.
Stir in tomato paste, cumin powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder, garam masala, and salt. Cook for about 1 minute to allow flavors to meld together.
Include green chilies if using, ensuring they are not too hot for your preference.
Pour in water (enough to cover the vegetables), bring it to a simmer, and cook until thickened.
Toss in sesame seeds if desired. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Garnish with chopped coriander leaves before serving.
